assay.description: Assay security-scanner tools. Use assay_list_files, assay_read_file, assay_grep, assay_scan_start, assay_record_finding, and assay_finalize_scan to walk a target plugin/MCP-server and produce a citation-verified verdict. Requires the `assay` binary on PATH (curl -sSL https://github.com/chawdamrunal/assay/install | sh).
